sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْقِصَصُ الْقَدِيمَةُ تَسْتَخْدِمُ الْحَيَوَانَاتِ لِتَعْلِيمِ الْأَطْفَالِ.
sentences.translation: Stare priče su koristile životinje kako bi podučavale djecu.
sentences.translationEn: Old stories used animals to teach children.

sentences.arabic: مَثَلًا، نَحْنُ نَعْرِفُ قِصَّةَ الْأَسَدِ وَالْفَأْرِ الصَّغِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Na primjer, poznajemo priču o lavu i malom mišu.
sentences.translationEn: For example, we know the story of the lion and the little mouse.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْحِكَايَاتُ تُعْطِينَا حِكْمَةً مُفِيدَةً فِي حَيَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Ove pripovijetke nam daju korisnu mudrost u našem životu.
sentences.translationEn: These tales give us useful wisdom in our lives.

sentences.arabic: الْكَاتِبُ يَسْتَعْمِلُ لُغَةً سَهْلَةً وَجَمِيلَةً جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Pisac koristi veoma jednostavan i lijep jezik.
sentences.translationEn: The writer uses very simple and beautiful language.

sentences.arabic: الْقِصَّةُ تُعَلِّمُنَا أَنَّ الصَّدِيقَ الْحَقِيقِيَّ يَظْهَرُ فِي وَقْتِ الشِّدَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Priča nas uči da se pravi prijatelj prepoznaje u nevolji.
sentences.translationEn: The story teaches us that a true friend appears in times of hardship.
